exampleSentencesTranslated: You can do this homework without help, without worry.
He was without having to go to the supermarket because mom already bought enough things.
She likes to drink morning coffee without milk and sugar.

translation.en: I need to get rid of this work.

notes:
khỏi usually means to recover (from illness). It’s a verb: you khỏi bệnh / khỏi ốm when you’re better.

It’s also very common to mean not have to / avoid doing something.  

Think of it as “be spared from.” Close to không cần (don’t need), but khỏi feels more like you’re free from or saved from doing it.

example.es: Me recuperé de mi enfermedad después de una semana.
example.vi: Tôi đã khỏi bệnh sau một tuần.
example.en: I recovered from my illness after a week.

definitions.es: Recuperarse o deshacerse de algo, especialmente una enfermedad o problema.
definitions.en: To recover or get rid of something, especially a disease or problem.
definitions.vi: Hồi phục hoặc thoát khỏi cái gì đó, đặc biệt là bệnh tật hoặc vấn đề.

exampleSentences: Em có thể làm bài tập này mà không cần giúp đỡ, khỏi lo nhé.
Anh đã khỏi phải đi siêu thị vì mẹ đã mua đủ đồ rồi.
Chị ấy thích uống cà phê buổi sáng khỏi sữa và đường.
notes_md:
**khỏi** usually means *to recover* (from illness). It’s a verb: you **khỏi bệnh / khỏi ốm** when you’re better.

It’s also very common to mean *not have to / avoid doing something*.  

Think of it as “be spared from.” Close to **không cần** (don’t need), but **khỏi** feels more like you’re free from or saved from doing it.

translation.en: I need to get rid of this work.
